meta.title: Docs Page Hero Banner — Daytime Camera POV
meta.usage_context: wide cinematic banner at the top of the /docs page, sits above the 'Documentation' title; matches the visual language of the Sentinel banner but in daylight (different mood, same camera-POV idiom)

subject.name: Daytime camera POV looking at a residential front entryway / foyer with normal everyday activity captured by a security camera

physical_properties.scene_type: residential front entryway or open-plan living area, photographed through a security camera with slight wide-angle lens character. Bright but soft natural daylight. Unoccupied — it's the camera's quiet 'on, watching' state during the day.

foreground.notes: Small minimal HUD-style badge in the top-left corner. Reads as a tiny rounded-rect with a green pulsing dot followed by the text 'LIVE' (small, all caps, monospace) and a faint timestamp like '14:32:08' in muted white below it. The badge is subtle, semi-transparent dark background, NOT a video-game HUD. Brand green dot (#22c55e). Roughly 2-3% of the frame's area.

Tiny text label 'CAM-01 · FRONT ENTRY' in monospace, semi-transparent dark background, in the bottom-left corner. Same minimal style as a real surveillance camera HUD overlay. About 1-2% of the frame. NO other text anywhere else.

midground.notes: Front entry of a residential home: a wooden front door with a small console table beside it holding a key dish and a vase with flowers. A staircase visible on one side. Tile or hardwood floor. Possibly a doormat. Bright but soft daylight streaming through the door's glass / a side window. Empty of people and pets. A quiet midday moment.

background.notes: Soft warm daylight fills the room. Subtle bokeh in the deep background suggesting the rest of the home. Highlights blown to a clean soft white where light enters through the door.

background.color: warm whites and creams (daylight) with neutral wood tones
background.texture: soft, slightly grainy (low-light sensor character even in daylight — surveillance camera look)

atmosphere.mood: calm, midday, watchful but unalarmed, professional, on-watch

camera.notes: Camera POV — placed near the ceiling in a corner, looking diagonally across the entryway toward the front door. Subtle wide-angle lens distortion at the corners (the same security-camera character as the Sentinel banner). Slight grain from the camera sensor.

lighting.notes: Bright soft daylight from outside the front door, fills the entryway. Some subtle warm bounce off wood and walls. Highlights in the doorway are clean and slightly blown — typical surveillance-camera dynamic range. No harsh shadows.

controls.leave_negative_space: balanced — the title 'Documentation' will overlay or sit above this banner; keep the upper third visually quieter so text reads on or near it
controls.notes: Photorealistic camera-POV scene with minimal HUD overlay accents — distinct DAYTIME mood vs the Sentinel banner's NIGHT mood, but same camera-POV visual language. Aspect ratio 21:9 cinematic wide. Should read as 'this is what an everyday view looks like through your camera, calmly online'.
